_comment: Fixed/recurring PH moments relevant to DuberyMNL sunglasses. The daily researcher reads this so it doesn't re-derive known anchors; seed_from_anchors.py materializes the upcoming ones into dated calendar rows. Dates are MM-DD. window_start = when to START posting, window_end = the peak/day. Mark variable-date holidays with date_note so the researcher verifies the exact date.

anchors.title: New Year fresh start
anchors.angle: New year, new look — fresh shades for a fresh start, resolution energy

anchors.title: Sinulog / Ati-Atihan fiesta season
anchors.angle: Festival season — glare-proof polarized shades for all-day street dancing under the sun
anchors.date_note: variable — verify Sinulog (Cebu, 3rd Sun Jan) + Ati-Atihan (Kalibo) dates

anchors.title: Valentine's Day
anchors.angle: His-and-hers / couple shades — giftable, matching-pair angle

anchors.title: Peak Pinoy summer (tag-init)
anchors.angle: Peak summer heat — polarized is a beach / pool / road-trip essential, the #1 sunglasses season

anchors.title: Holy Week getaway
anchors.angle: Semana Santa beach / province escape — travel-ready shades
anchors.date_note: variable — Holy Week shifts yearly, verify exact dates

anchors.title: Graduation / moving-up season
anchors.angle: Grad gift + barkada moving-up photos — a stylish 'congrats' present

anchors.title: Mother's Day
anchors.angle: Gift for mom — stylish shades she will actually wear

anchors.title: Araw ng Kalayaan (Independence Day)
anchors.angle: Pinoy pride — blue/red colorways, patriotic styling

anchors.title: Father's Day
anchors.angle: Gift for dad — 'dad drip', the tito who has everything

anchors.title: Rainy season (habagat) — glare counter-angle
anchors.angle: COUNTER-ANGLE: polarized cuts blinding glare off wet roads + windshields — safer rainy-day driving, not just a sunny-day product

anchors.title: Back-to-school
anchors.angle: Campus fits + commute shades for students heading back

anchors.title: Ber-months kickoff (Christmas begins)
anchors.angle: Pasko na! World's longest Christmas season begins — start the gifting ramp early

anchors.title: Surf / travel season (Siargao, La Union)
anchors.angle: Surf-trip + island-hop shades — Siargao / La Union travel content

anchors.title: Halloween
anchors.angle: Costume / cosplay accessory — spooky-cool flatlay styling

anchors.title: Undas (All Saints' / Souls' Day)
anchors.angle: Provincial road-trip for Undas — long-drive glare protection

anchors.title: Christmas gifting
anchors.angle: Top giftable idea — affordable, looks premium, the gift for the kuya/tito who has everything

anchors.title: Christmas parties / reunions
anchors.angle: Reunion + Christmas-party fits — group barkada looks, OOTD energy

anchors.title: New Year's Eve countdown
anchors.angle: NYE party shades — end-of-year, fresh-fit countdown energy
